auth.resetLinkSent: Reset link sent! Check your inbox for {{email}}.
auth.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
auth.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Check your inbox to confirm your email first
auth.errorAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists
auth.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again

today.allDone: You've done everything for today. Well done.
today.noStepsDesc: Go to Goals to create your first goal and add daily actions.
today.encouragement: Every journey starts with a single step. You've got this.

goals.title: Your Goals
goals.emptyDesc: Start by creating your first goal. The wizard will walk you through the science-backed process.
goals.microStepPrompt: What's the smallest daily action for this goal?
goals.confirmDeleteGoal: Delete this goal and all its data?
goals.confirmDeleteObstacle: Remove this obstacle and its If-Then plan?

plans.title: If-Then Plans
plans.emptyDesc: If-Then plans are created automatically when you add obstacles in the WOOP Wizard. You can also add them manually here.
plans.obstaclePlaceholder: e.g. I feel tired after work
plans.ifPlaceholder: e.g. I feel tired and want to skip training
plans.thenPlaceholder: e.g. Do just 10 minutes — starting is all that counts

journal.title: Small Wins
journal.emptyDesc: Log your first small win above. Progress is progress, no matter how small.
journal.promptTitle: What progress did you make today?
journal.promptSubtitle: No matter how small — every step counts.
journal.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Ran for 12 minutes even though it was raining. Showed up.
journal.alreadyLogged: Already logged today — you can update it.

woop.wishDesc: What do you want to achieve? Make it specific and meaningful.
woop.wishPlaceholder: e.g. Run a half marathon by December
woop.whyDesc: Why does {{title}} matter to you? Who are you becoming by doing this?
woop.whyPlaceholder: e.g. I want to prove to myself that I can commit to something hard. Running makes me feel alive and in control of my health.
woop.whyFootnote: This becomes part of your Motivation Charter — something to read when you feel like giving up.
woop.outcomeDesc: Close your eyes. You've achieved your goal. How does it feel? What does your life look like?
woop.outcomePlaceholder: e.g. I feel an immense sense of pride crossing the finish line. My body is strong. My friends are cheering. I proved I could do it.
woop.outcomeFootnote: This mental image is your fuel — research shows visualising the outcome combined with obstacles doubles your success rate.
woop.obstaclesDesc: What are the biggest internal or external things that could stop you? Be honest — naming them gives you power over them.
woop.obstacle1Placeholder: e.g. I get busy and skip training
woop.obstacle2Placeholder: e.g. My knees hurt after long runs
woop.plansDesc: For each obstacle, create an "If… Then…" contingency plan. Pre-deciding your response makes you 3× more likely to follow through.
woop.thenPlaceholder: e.g. Do a 10-minute walk instead to keep the habit alive
woop.noObstacles: Go back to add at least one obstacle first.
woop.microStepDesc: What is the smallest possible daily action that guarantees progress toward {{title}}?
woop.microStepFootnote: Keep it so small it feels almost too easy. Consistency matters more than intensity at the start.
woop.charterDesc: Here's your Motivation Charter — save it and read it whenever you feel like giving up.
woop.charterFootnote: You can always view and edit this in your Goals page.

0.title: Welcome to Make it So
0.body: Shape your reality through intentional daily action. This app is built on behavioral science to help you set meaningful goals, overcome obstacles, and build lasting habits.

1.title: The WOOP Method
1.body: Wish → Outcome → Obstacle → Plan. Research shows that mentally contrasting your wish with real obstacles — then forming If-Then plans — triples goal achievement.

2.title: Goals & Plans
2.body: Create goals using the WOOP wizard. Each obstacle gets paired with an If-Then plan: "IF I encounter X, THEN I will Y." Pre-loaded responses mean you act without deciding in the moment.

3.title: Your Daily Mission
3.body: The Today page shows your micro-steps — small daily actions tied to your goals. Complete them to build streaks. End each day by logging a win in the journal. Small wins compound.

4.title: You're Ready
4.body: Let's set up your first goal. The wizard takes about 5 minutes and walks you through the full WOOP process — wish, outcome, obstacle, and plan.
